name: Blitzstrike
short_description: Blitzstrike is a fast-paced 2D action-platformer where you play as Trixel, a sharp-tongued bounty hunter on a mission through a futuristic city and enemy-filled corridors, culminating in a dramatic showdown with her greatest threat yet.
detailed_description:
Fast, frantic, and stylish, Blitzstrike blends tight 2D gunplay with cinematic moments, hidden paths, and an explosive climax. It’s a short, sweet, sharp blast of arcade action designed to be beaten in under an hour—but packed with enough secrets and style to keep speedrunners and explorers coming back for more.

In Blitzstrike, you are Trixel — a pink-haired, trigger-happy bounty hunter with a sharp tongue, sharper reflexes, and zero patience for standing still. When a mysterious threat resurfaces, Trixel is thrust into a high-speed, high-stakes mission across a green-lit neon city, a sky-high bridge, and rooftops that barely hold beneath her boots. Along the way, she faces off against deadly bots, tight spaces, and a vicious threat who might just be her deadliest rival—or her only way out.

                                        

Features:

  • Arcade-tight 2D Gunplay – Fire fast, dash faster. Precision controls that reward quick thinking and quicker fingers.

  • Personality-Driven Pixel Art – Sharp sprites, expressive animations, and sass by the pixel-load.

  • Cinematic Battles – Face off in high-stakes showdowns packed with story and style.

  • Speedrun Friendly – Designed for repeat runs with hidden paths and secrets.

  • Full Controller Support – Works great with Steam Deck, plug-and-play with your favorite gamepad.

  • Fully Localized – English, French, Spanish, Russian, and Japanese supported.

  • Optional CRT Filter – Add retro flair with an optional scanline and color shader for that old-school vibe.

  • Full Voice Acting – Fully dubbed cutscenes and in-game sounds add an extra layer of immersion.

  • Bonus Content – After completing the main campaign, enjoy the bonus Speedrun Arena and Grueling Gauntlet modes.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Japanese, Russian, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
